import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "event": string;
  "user": string;
  "type": string;
  "time": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Recent Activity",
  "description": "Latest events across the platform.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "compact",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": false,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": false,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": false,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "event",
      "label": "Event",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "user",
      "label": "User",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "type",
      "label": "Type",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Login": "default",
        "Update": "secondary",
        "Delete": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "time",
      "label": "Time",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
